nodes.label: AI as starting point for research
nodes.grounding_span: I like to use AI as a starting point for my research, but I still like to conduct the thorough research myself

nodes.label: AI as coding assistant
nodes.grounding_span: I like to use it for help, but I still like to write some of the code myself

nodes.label: AI efficiency in coding
nodes.grounding_span: satisfied, when it writes an efficient coding component that would have taken me a much longer time to write

nodes.label: AI context-specific relevance
nodes.grounding_span: gives me some 'non-context specific' response that's irrelevant to my use case

nodes.label: AI as collaborative iterative partner
nodes.grounding_span: it's usually a very collaborative process, where I copy and paste a lot from different sources into the AI to ask it questions

nodes.label: Maintaining personal skills despite AI
nodes.label_negative: Over-reliance on AI leading to skill atrophy
nodes.grounding_span: I try to maintain my skills somewhat by practicing my skills often, even if AI is becoming superior in that area

nodes.label: Thorough understanding and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I still like to conduct the thorough research myself, often I'll notice AI missed some things

nodes.label: Productivity and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: it saves me a lot of time, and I'm able to iterate quickly on the solution I'm working on

nodes.label: Personal competence and skill retention
nodes.grounding_span: I try to maintain my skills somewhat by practicing my skills often

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI coding efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: satisfied, when it writes an efficient coding component that would have taken me a much longer time to write

nodes.label: Frustration with AI irrelevant responses
nodes.grounding_span: frustrated, when I'm using it for research or idea generation, and gives me some 'non-context specific' response

nodes.label: Preference for collaborative interaction
nodes.grounding_span: it's usually a very collaborative process

nodes.label: Intentional skill maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: I try to maintain my skills somewhat by practicing my skills often

nodes.label: Iterative refinement — cycles of prompt and adjust
nodes.grounding_span: then iterate if it doesn't do exactly what I want, so ask for modifications to that component

nodes.label: Contextual skill deployment — prioritizes real-time capability
nodes.grounding_span: it doesn't make sense to go back and forth with AI during a client meeting, I have to be able to deploy these skills quickly
